# PT Chart — ptchart.org

> Free refrigerant pressure-temperature saturation charts for 29 refrigerants. Data from NIST/CoolProp thermodynamic library. Built for HVAC technicians.

## Popular Refrigerants

- [R-410A PT Chart](https://ptchart.org/r-410a/): Residential AC standard (being replaced by R-454B)
- [R-454B PT Chart](https://ptchart.org/r-454b/): NEW standard since Jan 2025
- [R-22 PT Chart](https://ptchart.org/r-22/): Legacy Freon (banned, service only)
- [R-134a PT Chart](https://ptchart.org/r-134a/): Automotive AC
- [R-404A PT Chart](https://ptchart.org/r-404a/): Commercial refrigeration
- [R-32 PT Chart](https://ptchart.org/r-32/): Low-GWP alternative

## Tools

- [PT Calculator](https://ptchart.org/calculator/): Temperature ↔ pressure lookup for any refrigerant
- [Superheat & Subcooling](https://ptchart.org/superheat/): Target values and measurement guide
- [Compare Refrigerants](https://ptchart.org/compare/): Side-by-side PT chart comparisons
- [All Refrigerants](https://ptchart.org/all/): Complete list of 29 refrigerants

## Data

Each refrigerant page includes: saturation P-T table (PSIG, PSIA, kPa, bar), interactive chart, properties (GWP, ODP, safety class, critical point, boiling point), and common applications.
